title: Dragon Ruins II: Aftermath
description:
A hundred years have passed since a new generation of Legendary Heroes defeated an ancient dragon. Queen Elisaria passed away in peace, and the Royal Family suffered from decades of infighting until Prince Horatio V seized the throne.

In its weakened state, the Kingdom of Isigwere became a land of opportunity for mercenaries, with many shady jobs filling the notice boards. Among the ongoing chaos, a ragtag group of adventurers found itself in a tavern, looking for ways to make some coin.

And who knows, perhaps slay a dragon along the way.

KEY FEATURES• Assemble a party of 4 adventurers from an expanded roster of classes

• Fight, loot, and explore your way through 21 new dungeons

• Enjoy two new weapon types (Greatswords and Spears) and a reworked upgrade system

• Shape your party into an unstoppable force with new skills and items

• Track down and hunt WANTED monsters for extra rewards

• Enjoy an expanded soundtrack with over an hour of new music on top of familiar tracks
description_short: A standalone expansion for a dungeon crawler for tired people.
